description: Evidence from code-to-code MHD eigenvalue benchmarks and from violating Kumar's H1-H5 constraints to see the framework break in the predicted way.

open_questions.question: Are the implicit-headline claim(s) A_01, A_04 actually intended to generalize across this group, or do their authors scope them more narrowly than the propagator assumes?

suggested_next_steps.description: Read each implicit-headline claim's source paper and decide whether to add explicit out-of-regime predictions or to mark the claim as scoped only to its home regime.
suggested_next_steps.title: Scope verification

scope.framework: MHD literature; ideal MHD Atlas H1-H5; ideal MHD node counting
scope.system: magnetized plasma; rotating helical Z-pinch; static Z-pinch

title: Numerical eigenvalue benchmarks and constraint-violation tests
